title: Shrink Ray
description: Two new tools for resizing mobs.
body:
[![https://modfest.net/1.21](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b57a6c281e514bc6d3bb36f3dd5621b015a0185.png)](https://modfest.net/1.21)

This mod adds two new tools for resizing mobs.

The shrink ray halves a mobs size while the enlarge ray doubles it's size.
So a player would shrink or grow by a block either way.

This is done by applying the new shrink or enlarge effects to an mob.
